text: There is a sense of quiet curiosity in me as I stand in this modern space. The glass walls and people focused on their screens remind me how learning and connection often happen behind transparent but subtle barriers. The nearby exhibit, full of vibrant color and the bold letters "R+D," hints at an atmosphere of invention and progress. I feel like an observer on the edge of discovery, eager but slightly distanced, as if I am both part of and apart from the intellectual energy swirling around me.
